description_long: This is a large, detached suburban house surrounded by a dense arrangement of trees, providing a sense of privacy and seclusion. The structure features a complex, multi-gabled roof with several intersecting sections, and a prominent front porch area with steps leading up to the main entrance. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, some grouped in clusters and others standing alone, suggesting a custom architectural design. The exterior appears to be finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted siding, with additional details such as balconies and possibly a garage extension. The landscaping is lush, with mature trees forming a natural barrier around much of the property. The overall impression is of a spacious, upscale residence designed for comfort and visual appeal.
description: A large, upscale suburban house with a multi-gabled roof, asymmetrical windows, and surrounded by dense trees. Features include a prominent porch, balconies, and a light-colored exterior.
description_view_0: Front and left side of the house with the main entry porch, visible balcony, and dense trees curving around the property.
description_view_1: Rear and right side of the house, showing more of the roof structure and a garage extension, with trees forming a backdrop.
description_view_2: Back view of the house, mostly obscured by a thick line of trees, with only the upper story and roof visible.
description_view_3: Front and right side of the house, highlighting the main entry, driveway area, and a curved arrangement of trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, covered porch, and possible decorative columns or overhang
